description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called test that runs in the default test stage. The job uses the default Docker image (e.g., ubuntu) and executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-pip python-dev build-essential, pip install -r requirements.txt, cd pynoise, and py.test. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
